zh.lifeSummary: 當Gaston VII Vicomte de Béarn於1221年出生在法國阿奎泰培列內-阿特藍可斯索維特-德-貝阿時，他的父親Guillaume II de Béarn27歲，母親Gersende De Provence De Sabran Y Folcaquier21歲。他於1240年與Viscomtessa de Marsan Mathe de Marsan De Bigorre在法國結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。他埋葬在法國o-阿爾培斯洛易普拉莫爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gaston VII Vicomte de Béarn于1221年出生在法国阿奎泰培列內-阿特藍可斯索維特-德-貝阿时，他的父亲Guillaume II de Béarn27岁，母亲Gersende De Provence De Sabran Y Folcaquier21岁。他于1240年与Viscomtessa de Marsan Mathe de Marsan De Bigorre在法国结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。他埋葬在法国o-阿爾培斯洛易普拉莫爾。

nameMeanings.name: Gaston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain origin; a traditional name in aristocratic families of Languedoc, so perhaps an altered form of Gascon, denoting someone from Gascony in Languedoc.

nameMeanings.name: VII
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Victor
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name meaning ‘conqueror’. This was popular among early Christians as a reference to Christ's victory over death and sin, and was borne by several saints. An influence on the choice of the name in more recent times was the American actor  Victor Mature  (  1915–99 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Gaston VII Vicomte de Béarn was born in 1221, in Sauveterre-de-Béarn, Pyrénées-Atlantiques, Aquitaine, France, his father, Guillaume II de Béarn, was 27 and his mother, Gersende De Provence De Sabran Y Folcaquier, was 21. He married Viscomtessa de Marsan Mathe de Marsan De Bigorre in 1240, in France. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. He was buried in Pramol, Loire, Rhône-Alpes, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gaston VII Vicomte de Béarn est né en 1221, à Sauveterre-de-Béarn, Pyrénées-Atlantiques, Aquitaine, France, son père, Guillaume II de Béarn, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Gersende De Provence De Sabran Y Folcaquier, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Viscomtessa de Marsan Mathe de Marsan De Bigorre en 1240, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Ilenterré à Pramol, Loire, Rhône-Alpes, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gaston VII Vicomte de Béarn 1221 in Sauveterre-de-Béarn, Pyrénées-Atlantiques, Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume II de Béarn 27 und seine Mutter Gersende De Provence De Sabran Y Folcaquier 21. Er hat 1240 in Frankreich Viscomtessa de Marsan Mathe de Marsan De Bigorre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Er wurde in Pramol, Loire, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gaston VII Vicomte de Béarn è nato il nel 1221 nel Sauveterre-de-Béarn, Pyrénées-Atlantiques, Aquitaine, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume II de Béarn, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Gersende De Provence De Sabran Y Folcaquier, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Viscomtessa de Marsan Mathe de Marsan De Bigorre nel 1240, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Fu sepolto a Pramol, Loire, Rhône-Alpes, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Gaston VII Vicomte de Béarnが1221年にフランスアクイティアインプイルeンeエス-アトランティクスサウベテレ-デ-ブeアルンで生まれた時，父Guillaume II de Béarnは27歳，母Gersende De Provence De Sabran Y Folcaquierは21歳であった。1240年にフランスでViscomtessa de Marsan Mathe de Marsan De Bigorreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼はフランスルhoネ-アルペスロイアープラモルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gaston VII Vicomte de Béarn(이)가 1221년 프랑스 아키테인 p이ee스-앳랜티크스 소베터레-데-브e아른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume II de Béarn(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Gersende De Provence De Sabran Y Folcaquier(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1240년 프랑스에서 Viscomtessa de Marsan Mathe de Marsan De Bigorre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 프랑스 ho니-알프스 로이르 프램에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gaston VII Vicomte de Béarn nasceu em 1221, em Sauveterre-de-Béarn, Pyrénées-Atlantiques, Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Guillaume II de Béarn, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Gersende De Provence De Sabran Y Folcaquier, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Viscomtessa de Marsan Mathe de Marsan De Bigorre em 1240, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ele foi sepultado em Pramol, Loire, Rhône-Alpes, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gaston VII Vicomte de Béarn родился в 1221 г. в местности сауветирре-де-бeарн, пирeнeес-атлантикуесь, аквитеин, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume II de Béarn было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Gersende De Provence De Sabran Y Folcaquier, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Viscomtessa de Marsan Mathe de Marsan De Bigorre в 1240 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Он был похоронен в местности прамол, лоир, рoне-алпесь, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gaston VII Vicomte de Béarn nació en 1221, en Sauveterre-de-Béarn, Pyrénées-Atlantiques, Aquitaine, Francia, su papá, Guillaume II de Béarn, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Gersende De Provence De Sabran Y Folcaquier, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Viscomtessa de Marsan Mathe de Marsan De Bigorre en 1240, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Fue sepultado en Pramol, Loire, Rhône-Alpes, Francia.
